name: Llanddarog Fair Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the butter into the flour and add the sugar.
2. Mix in the beer to form a soft dough.
3. Roll out on a floured board to a thickness of 0.5 inch.
4. Cut into rounds and press the fruit into the surface.
5. Cook in a moderate oven (376°F or Mark 5) for 15 minutes.
